result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 9:     AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT 
    old_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT 
    owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, old_owner AS owner FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, new_owner AS owner FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(new_owner) <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY owner
)
SELECT h.agent_id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.cases_handled ASC, h.agent_id
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT 
    old_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT 
    owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, old_owner AS owner FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, new_owner AS owner FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(new_owner) <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY owner
)
SELECT h.agent_id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.cases_handled ASC, h.agent_id
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01 00:00:00'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01 00:00:00'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT 
    old_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT 
    owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, old_owner AS owner FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, new_owner AS owner FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(new_owner) <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY owner
)
SELECT h.agent_id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.cases_handled ASC, h.agent_id
LIMIT 1;

  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, old_owner AS owner FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, new_owner AS owner FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(new_owner) <> ''

FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id

args.query:
WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'owner%'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01 00:00:00'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01 00:00:00'
)
SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM casehistory__c ch
WHERE ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01 00:00:00'
  AND ch.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01 00:00:00'
GROUP BY field__c
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql:
WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'owner%'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01 00:00:00'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01 00:00:00'
)
SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM casehistory__c ch
WHERE ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01 00:00:00'
  AND ch.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01 00:00:00'
GROUP BY field__c
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;

args.query:
WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01 00:00:00'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01 00:00:00'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT 
    old_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT 
    owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, old_owner AS owner FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(old_owner) <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, new_owner AS owner FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(new_owner) <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY owner
)
SELECT h.agent_id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.cases_handled ASC, h.agent_id
LIMIT 1;
